W8 spec complete: multi-file categorised eu doc --prelude with --output-dir, supplement merging, table format, Python script deleted. PR #828 merged, Wicket verified against spec.

W9 spec complete: Demand on CoreBinding in core/expr.rs, survives through all pipeline passes, prune sets AtMostOnce, STG compiler reads from core annotation, UnitInterface.demands populated after prune pass. PR #830 merged, Wicket verified against spec.

W4p2 spec complete: declaration-level error recovery with real token spans, ERROR wrapping for malformed declarations, integration test proving valid declarations survive. PR #829 merged, Wicket verified against spec.

All 6 phases complete. PR #831 merged (dfb70ba1). Phase 1: QueryStore framework. Phase 2: file_text/parse queries. Phase 3: PipelineCacheEntry, per-stage hashes (Desugar through Diagnostics). Phase 4: store_pipeline_result populates all QueryKey variants with content hashes. Phase 5: CachedPipeline removed, all LSP handlers read from QueryStore. Phase 6: 15+ new tests including cross-file invalidation, edit simulation, content-identical edit. All 9 acceptance criteria verified. CI green (run 27549331918).

Fixed in commit a0e29d0e. is_user_identifier() in content.rs now excludes prelude constants (null, true, false, nil, identity, const) from assignment-style detection. Conformance test test_all_conformance passes. CI green.

Fixed in PR #833 (monad specs in blob) + PR #834 (test harness uses blob path). MonadSpec serialised into PreludeBlob, seeded into UnitInterface on load. Test harness now exercises blob path matching default user experience.
Fixed in PR #834. Test harness now loads prelude blob, passes it to executor, and uses plan_only flag (refactored from overloaded test flag) to run full pipeline during test execution.
Closed in favour of Approach A (eu-tc2b). STG compiler should not do transformations — core is for transformation, STG is generated clean from core.
Already implemented in PR #836 — closed_body() in tag.rs replaces flat combinator() check with recursive closed expression tree detection.

Merged in PR #836. Fixed-point collection of 78 prelude inline cores, pre-expanded at blob generation time (no Var::Free in blob). naive_fib matches 0.8.1 baseline (6.2s). 14 unit tests for closed_body and all_free_vars_in_set. Doc comments on substs safety invariant.

Mitigated by PR #836 (precompiled inline cores). Combinator prelude functions (arithmetic, comparisons, if, head, tail, etc.) are now inlined as direct BIF calls, eliminating the Ref::G → thunk → lambda wrapper overhead. naive_fib restored to 0.8.1 baseline. Remaining Ref::G overhead only affects non-combinator functions where the cost is negligible relative to their body execution.

Fixed in commit 5b6d412c. reconstruct_node/reconstruct_form now return Result<_, BlobReconstructError>. Runtime falls back to intrinsic-only globals with warning on failure.

Already implemented. collect_deprecation_fix_actions in actions.rs generates QUICKFIX code actions for deprecated names with replaced-by metadata. Wired into on_code_action via cached pipeline warnings. 3 unit tests.

Added col_of(source, line, needle) UTF-16 column helper, replaced 16 magic column numbers with col_of calls, added assert_goto_def_line helper, strengthened 3 vacuous is_some() assertions to verify content. All 111 LSP tests pass, clippy clean. Commits: cc2233f6, d5d933b8.
Merged PR #843: type_str_to_json_schema now uses parse_type() and pattern-matches on Type enum. Handles records, tuples, DateTime, literal types, Never, quantified types. 9 unit tests.
Merged PR #842: end-of-run GC guarded by policy_requires_collection(), CommonArgs extracted, --heap-limit-mib available in test mode, 26 CLI tests.
Merged PR #844: sectioned layout, bar charts, thousands separators, summary bar, global alignment. 14 unit tests. Review fixes merged in PR #845.

Merged PR #846: SIGINT handler sets AtomicBool flag, VM checks every 500 steps, returns Interrupted error with exit code 130. Stats printed on interrupt. eval::run returns RunResult with stats on both success and error paths.
19 AoC baselines recorded at 0.9.2. PR #847 merged. 4 part-2s timed out (day04, day08, day09, day10) — no baseline for those.
Profiling complete. Key finding: prelude O(depth) traversal is dominant bottleneck (mean de Bruijn index 4,507). GC is negligible. PR #849 merged.
Profiling complete. Key finding: prelude O(depth) traversal is dominant bottleneck (mean de Bruijn index 4,507). GC is negligible. PR #849 merged.

Git imports restored. Locator::Git variant, { git:, commit:, import: } parser, ~/.eu/cache/git/ bare-clone cache, missing-commit error, error test test_error_167 all implemented. Docs updated, FNV-1a cache hash, path traversal validation, panic removed. PR #848 merged.

Namespace lambda hoisting pass implemented. Locator::Git variant, hoist.rs pass in src/core/transform/, inserted between cook and DCE in prepare.rs, self-referential skip via free_vars check, block?(str) preservation verified, harness test 167_namespace_hoisting.eu covers str intrinsics/lambdas/chaining/block-preservation, 5 unit tests, generic over all DefaultBlockLet namespaces. PR #850 merged.

Implemented in PR #859 (feat/blob-namespace-hoisting). Spec ACs 1-12 satisfied: xtask reports hoisted count (AC1), blob updated with individual namespace globals (AC2), Lookup→Ref::G rewrite via hoist_with_blob_globals (AC3), block?(str) preserved and tested (AC4), inline_cores path exercised via existing mechanism (AC5-7), parity by construction (AC8), all CI green (AC9-11).

W11 demand analysis complete. Acceptance criteria #1–8, #10–12 met across PRs #857, #860, #861: suppress_update removed, single_use_args removed, strict_args public API removed (pub(crate) seed-only), demand sig table wired into STG compiler and wrap.rs as single canonical source, eu dump demands working with per-binding annotations, IF branches compile as Values (AtMostOnce/skip_update), stack depth flat for tail-recursive conditionals. AC#9 (LetRec fixed-point) deferred by coordinator as non-blocking; conservative Multi-for-all-let-bindings is sound.

W11 demand analysis addresses recursive scope concern via conservative sound approach: analyse_let() promotes AtMostOnce→Multi for all let bindings (core scopes are recursive; blackhole detection must remain active). LetRec fixed-point iteration (which would refine non-recursive single-use bindings to AtMostOnce) deferred by coordinator as non-blocking. The conservative Multi approach is sound and passes all tests. Delivered across PRs #857, #860, #861.

LetRec fixed-point demand analysis implemented in PR #862. Dependency graph + BFS cycle detection identifies truly recursive bindings (forced Multi) vs non-recursive single-use bindings (AtMostOnce). Taint propagation catches non-recursive bindings used by recursive ones. Blackhole detection preserved: self-referential bindings remain Multi. Test 157 (p: p(1)) still raises BlackHole error correctly.
Demand analysis regressions fixed (PR #868: lub→plus, argument scaling). Re-enabled by default (PR #870). All AoC examples match baseline with analysis active. Windows CI confirmed clean.

LetRec SCC splitting implemented via Tarjan's algorithm. Non-recursive bindings extracted into Let scopes, enabling demand analysis to assign AtMostOnce. DefaultBlockLet scopes correctly excluded. Also fixed pre-existing STG optimiser bug in LetIndexTransformation. PR #873 merged.

PR #874 merged (f505590). New reflatten pass in src/core/reflatten.rs merges nested Let chains after demand analysis. SCC splitting re-enabled. 6 unit tests, all CI green. Spec acceptance criteria 1-10 verified by Wicket.

PR #875 merged (d3c1dcee). HashSet-based minor collection with line-only marking, original flip-at-end major unchanged. All CI green including source-prelude, GC-verified, AddressSanitizer, aarch64. Verified by Wicket.

PR #876 merged (38639307). Named signature table threaded from analyse_demands through StgSettings into STG Compiler. App call sites look up user function demand signatures. Zero regression. Note: name-keyed lookup needs scope-qualification before DA goes live (follow-up). Verified by Wicket.

Benchmarked by Furnace-7 on day01, day12, and deep_find workloads. Max env depth 2-4 across all cases. Avg steps/lookup under 2.0. SCC splitting has zero effect on env depth. Flat closures not warranted — cactus stack is effectively O(1) in practice.
PR #877 merged (1af0c373). Fixed eu dump split to proceed on parse errors. Fixed eu dump runtime in blob mode to show prelude globals (~8400 lines vs ~1867 source-prelude). Verified by Wicket.

Demand analysis enabled on master, neutral performance (zero benefit, zero harm). Infrastructure in place: intrinsic signatures, SCC splitting, reflatten, user function signature wiring. AtMostOnce disabled pending soundness analysis (eu-4cyp). Strict cardinality working but no measurable improvement yet.

PR #879 merged (5e68918b). Refactored day01 and day09 from map-then-aggregate to foldl patterns. day01-p2: -93% ticks, -51% allocs, -96% mark time. Nursery benefit now visible — minors reclaim young objects instead of promoting everything. Verified by Wicket, outputs match.

PR #880 merged (0be970a1). Post-analysis fixup forces Multi on DefaultBlockLet scopes with Block body, making AtMostOnce sound for non-rendered scopes. Re-enabled AtMostOnce → Value update elision. No regression on 010_prelude, -40% allocs on day01 test case. Verified by Wicket.

PR #883 merged. HeapNavigator::get ok_or → match eliminates 20.7% mutator overhead from eagerly constructing+dropping ExecutionError. ~10% wall time improvement on mutator-bound workloads. Profiling verified: drop_in_place<ExecutionError> 20.7% → 0.9%.
PR #885 merged (78f4d875). One-line fix: Step 7 fixup now checks Block body regardless of LetType, fixing 2x regression on 008_folds caused by OtherLet scopes bypassing the fixup.
PR #886 merged (3115e97f). Nursery GC reverted (PRs #875, #884). Kept HeapNavigator fix (PR #883). ROADMAP.md updated with post-mortem. Verified by Wicket.
Nursery reverted. Sticky-mark-bit approach doesn't deliver benefit for eucalypt workloads. See ROADMAP.md post-mortem. Future: separate copying nursery after list fusion.
Implemented and measured — zero AtMostOnce bindings on benchmarks. Too conservative to be useful. Approach B (PR #885) was the better solution.
day01, day04, day09 refactored (PRs #879, #881). day08 investigated — already efficient. day10/day11 need persistent blocks (0.11). All source-fixable cases addressed.

PR #890 merged (09c61408). Strict eager eval via Seq — forces strict non-recursive thunks at definition time. -38% allocs, -34% ticks on 010_prelude. -76% on 008_folds. AllocationPruner Seq handling fixed for source-prelude mode. Verified by Wicket, CI 10/10 green.

PR #891 merged (617175ea). Prelude demand signature table (~60 functions) enables strict Seq wrapping for global call-site args. Minimal measurable impact on current benchmarks (most prelude calls use catenation style with simple ref args). Infrastructure correct — Seq forms emitted for complex args. then signature fixed (branches lazy, only condition strict). Verified by Wicket.

Implemented and profiled. Flat closures reduce env get() self-time by 27% but add universal overhead (capture array allocation, recipe resolution, wider dispatch) that causes 2-10% net regression across all programs. At eucalypt's shallow env depths (avg 2), the cactus stack is near-optimal. Implementation issues (extra Ref variant branching, universal recipe tax) leave room for a different implementation strategy. Branch archived at archive/flat-closures for future study. Findings recorded in ROADMAP.md.

PR #895 merged. cons prelude demand signature was [sm(), sm()] (strict) — changed to [lm(), lm()] (lazy). cons wraps __CONS data constructor which must not force args. Caused infinite forcing in iterate/scanl/repeat over infinite lists in blob mode.

PR #896 merged (d772fefd). Coinductive cycle detection added to is_consistent for µ-types. Assumed-pairs set tracks (s,t) pairs and returns true on revisit. 7 new unit tests including mutual recursion. Fixes stack overflow on projects with recursive type annotations. Verified by Wicket, CI 10/10 green.
Fixed in PR #897 — runtime override of stale blob __args/__io globals
Fixed in PR #898 — render_debug_repr_forced evaluates inner thunks
Partially fixed in PR #898 — suppress misleading prelude source locations for assertion failures
Fixed in PR #899 — BRACKET_CLOSE added to is_callable_terminal() in kind.rs
Partially addressed in PR #900 (still in review for broader docs coverage)

Merged into CG3 (eu-r7vr). Root cause analysis showed both the accumulator Update-frame chain and the higher-order fold O(n²) env-walk are caused by the same mechanism: args wrapped as lazy Atom{Ref::L} closures at recursive call sites. CG3's seq-strict-args-before-recurse fix addresses both.
PR #905 merged (90ce21ff). DirectApp for Ref::G globals. Ref::L gap noted for revisit.
PR #906 merged (73a9b36a). 6 false positive fixes, checker default-on, --suppress-type-warnings added.
PR #907 merged (0997ce65). Compile-time validation, to-data/from-data projection, t-* vocabulary, TYPE_TO_DATA intrinsic. Doc extract fix bonus.
PR #908 merged (382a070a). to-spec/as-spec prelude functions, datetime? predicate, __ISZDT intrinsic.
PR #909 merged (efac0dc8). FieldPresence enum, parser ?-suffix, subtyping, checker, to-data/to-spec integration. All 10 criteria verified.
PR #910 merged (c5fd9136). LookupLit node for literal-key lookups, WHNF fast path with LookupOr fallback.
PR #911 merged (dc4e236d). Seq-wrap all args at self-recursive call sites. O(n²) → O(n) for higher-order folds (19.2× at N=10k). ProtoThunkAtom design for atom Update frames.

BV0 spike NO-GO. PR #912. Bytecode dispatch 1.15× slower (1.780s vs 1.549s on day11-p1). Root cause: HeapSyn::Atom stub allocation overhead per bytecode dispatch step. A viable bytecode VM needs native bytecode offset support in closures (large refactor) or a register/stack-based VM. Gate: reassess per ROADMAP §6.4.
PR #913 merged (1ed43c7b). DirectApp extended to Ref::L locals via demand-signature proxy. Blackhole+Update in fallback path. Test 180 covers letrec functions.
PR #914 merged (5bb1330b). parse_scheme replaces parse_type for full type-DSL, ! escape hatch removed.

PR #915 merged (942c3799). Replaced unsound force-all-args (ProtoThunkAtom/Seq) with targeted eager resolution via create_arg_array_eager. O(n²) → O(n) confirmed. Bomb test 181 verifies unused divergent args are not forced.
PR #918 merged. Alias resolution works in blob mode. Source-prelude mode gap remains — follow-up needed.
